docs.title: Forge — Claude Code harness
docs.summary: Installation, update, uninstall, and feature overview for the Forge Claude Code scaffold.

docs.title: Working Agreement for Claude
docs.summary: Persistent session rules loaded into every Claude Code conversation: detect-stack, find-reuse, TDD, canonical-sources-first.

docs.title: Building a Claude Harness — design rationale
docs.summary: Long-form write-up of the six-layer harness design: CLAUDE.md, skills, subagents, hooks, MCP, settings.

docs.title: /forge.tasks — decompose a spec into a task list
docs.summary: Slash command: runs task-decomposition skill to produce .forge/NNN-slug/tasks.md.

docs.title: /forge.clarify — resolve spec ambiguities interactively
docs.summary: Slash command: runs clarify-spec skill and writes .forge/NNN-slug/clarifications.md.

docs.title: /forge.implement — execute a task list in a worktree
docs.summary: Slash command: runs implement-plan skill, creates a git worktree, and executes tasks with per-task pauses.

docs.title: task-decomposition skill
docs.summary: Converts a feature spec into a dependency-ordered task list with routing metadata (T-NNN entries).

docs.title: clarify-spec skill
docs.summary: Scans a task list for ambiguities and returns structured questions for the user to resolve.

docs.title: implement-plan skill
docs.summary: Validates the task DAG, resolves routing fields, and produces a per-task routing plan before execution.
